sheet_name: แบบขยายรั้วแบบที่ 2

element.description: Fence column C1 — reinforced concrete post between fence bays (same spec as Fence Type 1)
Ground beam (คานคอดิน) tying fence columns together at grade (same spec as Fence Type 1)
ทับหลัง คสล (RC capping lintel beam on top of the block infill panel, distinct from Fence Type 1 which has no top RC lintel)
Precast/concrete block infill panel between columns (replaces the steel pickets used in Fence Type 1)
element.block_spec: คอนกรีตบล็อคทีบ 0.19x0.39 ม หนา 7 ซม (concrete block/panel, 190mm x 390mm, 70mm thick)

element.description: Pile foundation under each fence column (same spec as Fence Type 1)
element.pile_spec: เสาเข็ม 2-0.15x0.15x4.00ม (2 precast concrete piles, 150x150mm section, 4.00m long, per column)
element.dowel: DOWEL Ø12 ยาว 1.00ม เทคอนกรีตยึดกับเสาเข็ม (12mm dowel bar, 1.00m long, cast to bond pile cap to pile)
element.lean_concrete: คอนกรีตหยาบ (lean/blinding concrete at base)

warnings: Sheet A-15 shows a second fence design (Type 2) across plan, front elevation, cap-lintel detail (ขยายทับหลัง), column detail (ขยายเสา C1), ground beam detail (ขยายคานคอดิน GB), and section — kept as one file since it's a single fence type.

Column C1, ground beam GB, and pile foundation specs are identical to Fence Type 1 (บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า16.json) — the only structural difference is the infill panel (precast concrete block instead of steel pickets) and the addition of a top RC capping lintel over the block panel.
The lintel reinforcement notation includes a handwritten-looking Thai abbreviation ('ป' for ปลอก/stirrup) next to '6mm@0.15m' — read with moderate confidence; recommend zoom verification.
See sibling file บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า16.json (A-14, Fence Type 1) for the alternate fence design.
